---
title: Quick Start
---

To get started with OSF please visit the [Getting started on the OSF (Video) - OSF Support](https://help.osf.io/article/342-getting-started-on-the-osf). You can also subscribe to the onboarding webinars [OSF \| Trainings and Webinars](https://www.cos.io/osf-onboarding?utm_source=osf_onboarding&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome).

Once a year, there will be an OSF workshop organised by VU application managers, where you learn how you can use OSF. See the [Trainings page](/topics/trainings.qmd#open-science-framework-osf-workshop) for training materials and scheduled workshops. 

More in-depth information is available in the guide [How can you use Open Science Framework (OSF) in your research project?](use-osf.qmd). See the [Information for new users guide](use-osf.qmd#osf-information-for-new-users) in that guide for more information for new users.
